update.author: Jules Cabrera
update.done_this_week: Prep work is done; kickoff of the customer-facing rollout starts Monday.
update.target_next_week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.
update.blockers: Downstream integration test suite is flaky; may hide a regression at go-live.

update.author: Odin Barone
update.done_this_week: Slipped the promised design review; rescheduling for later this week.
update.target_next_week: Focus on removing the current blocker; deprioritise nice-to-haves.
update.blockers: Owner is oncall this week; capacity is halved.

update.author: Nya Sardar
update.done_this_week: Shipped the last remaining PR and confirmed the target metric moved as expected.
update.target_next_week: Hand off to the on-call rotation and close the epic.

update.author: Dara Okonjo
update.done_this_week: Cleared the staging soak; production rollout scheduled for early next week.
update.target_next_week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.
update.blockers: Adjacent team is mid-migration — could take longer to help if we hit a snag.

update.author: Cai Nguyen
update.done_this_week: Wrapped the rollout to 100% and the guardrail dashboards stayed green.
update.target_next_week: Monitor for the next 2 weeks; no active work planned.

Weekly Objective Update — Gamma Runtime — Week 31

- At risk: 1 (0 red, 1 yellow)
- Not started: 0
- Done: 2
- Missing updates: 0
- Blockers / risks: 3

Hi team,

Please find the latest objective health report.

Sorted by status: on track, at risk, delayed, not started, missing, done.
